# RadioLedger
> The open-source ledger for radio amateurs

## About
RadioLedger is an open-source ham radio logging platform for self-hosting with Docker Compose.
License: AGPLv3. Built with Go (API), PostgreSQL + PostGIS (database), and Chart.js (statistics).

## Docs
- [Getting Started](https://docs.radioledger.app/getting-started)
- [Self-Hosting Guide](https://docs.radioledger.app/self-hosting)

- [Mobile App](https://docs.radioledger.app/mobile)

- [QRZ Logbook Sync](https://docs.radioledger.app/sync/qrz)
- [eQSL Sync](https://docs.radioledger.app/sync/eqsl)
- [ClubLog Sync](https://docs.radioledger.app/sync/clublog)
- [POTA Logging](https://docs.radioledger.app/sync/pota)
- [SOTA Logging](https://docs.radioledger.app/sync/sota)
- [Awards Tracking](https://docs.radioledger.app/user-guide/awards-tracking)
- [Statistics Dashboard](https://docs.radioledger.app/user-guide/statistics)
- [WSJT-X Auto-Logging](https://docs.radioledger.app/desktop/wsjtx-setup)
- [Contest Logging](https://docs.radioledger.app/contest)
- [Security Posture](https://docs.radioledger.app/security)
- [FAQ](https://docs.radioledger.app/faq)

## API
OpenAPI spec: https://docs.radioledger.app/api/openapi.json
Base URL (self-hosted): http://localhost:8080/v1
Authentication: Bearer token (API key or OAuth2 access token)
Stream Security: Short-lived, single-use stream tokens for SSE connections
All responses use: {success, data, message, error} envelope

## Quick Start (Self-Hosted)
```bash
git clone https://github.com/FtlC-ian/radioledger.git
cd radioledger/docker
./init.sh
docker compose up -d
# Web UI at http://localhost:3000
# API at http://localhost:8080
```

## Key Features
- **QSO Logging**: Full ADIF field support and semantic-lossless round-trip import/export.
- **Callsign Databases**: Local cache of 9 countries (1.5M records) with daily FCC sync.
- **Sync Services**: LoTW, QRZ, eQSL, ClubLog, POTA, SOTA with background retry and circuit breakers.
- **Awards Tracking**: Real-time progress for DXCC, WAS, VUCC, WAZ, WPX, POTA, SOTA.
- **Statistics**: Chart.js visualizations, activity heatmaps, and trend analytics.
- **Admin Dashboard**: Visibility into River background jobs and callsign sync status.
- **Desktop Client**: macOS, Windows, Linux client with LoTW signing and UDP auto-logging.
- **Mobile App**: Offline-first POTA/SOTA activation mode.
- **Security**: Public security posture docs, RLS tenant isolation, scoped API keys, desktop-local LoTW signing, and encrypted external-service credential storage.

## LoTW Setup (Important)
LoTW uses desktop-local signing through tQSL, keeping certificate material on the operator's computer.
Install desktop client → run setup wizard → select tQSL certificate → enable desktop-local upload.

## Tech Stack
- API: Go, chi router, sqlc, pgx/v5, River (job queue)
- Database: PostgreSQL 17 + PostGIS 3.5
- Auth: Zitadel (OIDC/OAuth2, multi-tenant)
- Desktop: Tauri (Rust + web frontend)
- License: AGPLv3

## Source Code
https://github.com/FtlC-ian/radioledger
